revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Dairizuka Kofun Cluster]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Dairizuka Kofun Cluster]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:内裏塚古墳群); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dairizuka_Kofun_Cluster here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dairizuka_Kofun_Cluster for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:06, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/78754118 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:06, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:内裏塚古墳群 | revid=78754118 --> {{選考審査の記録 |現状ステータス = GA |デフォルトソート = たいりつかこふんくん
|タイプ1 = |過程1 = [[Wikipedia:月間強化記事賞/2009年12月|月間強化記事賞]] |結果1 = 受賞・良質な記事自動選出 |日付1 = 20100110 }}
